name: @tetherto/wdk-examples
description: Runnable code examples for WDK (Wallet Development Kit) SDK modules

scripts.validate:wdk: tsx wdk/getting-started.ts && tsx wdk/register-wallets.ts && tsx wdk/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wdk/send-transactions.ts && tsx wdk/middleware.ts && tsx wdk/error-handling.ts
scripts.validate:wallet-evm: tsx wallet-evm/create-wallet.ts && tsx wallet-evm/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wallet-evm/check-balances.ts && tsx wallet-evm/read-only-account.ts && tsx wallet-evm/send-transaction.ts && tsx wallet-evm/token-transfer.ts && tsx wallet-evm/sign-verify-message.ts && tsx wallet-evm/fee-management.ts && tsx wallet-evm/memory-management.ts
scripts.validate:wallet-evm-erc-4337: tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/create-wallet.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/check-balances.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/read-only-account.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/send-transaction.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/token-transfer.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/sign-verify-message.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/fee-management.ts && tsx wallet-evm-erc-4337/memory-management.ts
scripts.validate:wallet-solana: tsx wallet-solana/create-wallet.ts && tsx wallet-solana/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wallet-solana/check-balances.ts && tsx wallet-solana/read-only-account.ts && tsx wallet-solana/send-transaction.ts && tsx wallet-solana/token-transfer.ts && tsx wallet-solana/sign-verify-message.ts && tsx wallet-solana/fee-management.ts && tsx wallet-solana/memory-management.ts
scripts.validate:wallet-sui: tsx wallet-sui/create-wallet.ts && tsx wallet-sui/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wallet-sui/check-balances.ts && tsx wallet-sui/read-only-account.ts && tsx wallet-sui/send-transaction.ts && tsx wallet-sui/token-transfer.ts && tsx wallet-sui/sign-verify-message.ts && tsx wallet-sui/fee-management.ts && tsx wallet-sui/memory-management.ts
scripts.validate:wallet-ton: tsx wallet-ton/create-wallet.ts && tsx wallet-ton/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wallet-ton/check-balances.ts && tsx wallet-ton/read-only-account.ts && tsx wallet-ton/send-transaction.ts && tsx wallet-ton/token-transfer.ts && tsx wallet-ton/sign-verify-message.ts && tsx wallet-ton/fee-management.ts && tsx wallet-ton/memory-management.ts
scripts.validate:wallet-tron: tsx wallet-tron/create-wallet.ts && tsx wallet-tron/manage-accounts.ts && tsx wallet-tron/check-balances.ts && tsx wallet-tron/read-only-account.ts && tsx wallet-tron/send-transaction.ts && tsx wallet-tron/token-transfer.ts && tsx wallet-tron/sign-verify-message.ts && tsx wallet-tron/fee-management.ts && tsx wallet-tron/memory-management.ts
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:wdk && npm run validate:wallet-evm && npm run validate:wallet-evm-erc-4337 && npm run validate:wallet-solana && npm run validate:wallet-ton && npm run validate:wallet-tron && npm run validate:mcp-toolkit
